name: Frozen N-gram Oracle + Hedge Mixer + SGD TTT (Research, Not Validated at Scale)
author: Dhruv Puri
blurb: Hybrid system: a frozen multi-order n-gram oracle (built offline from FineWeb training tokens, ~5MB compressed) is bundled into a single artifact alongside the neural model and used as additional experts in the existing Hedge Mixer at TTT/eval time. Adds SGD TTT (PR #967) and LeakyReLU(0.75)^2 (PR #977). End-to-end pipeline validated locally on RTX 4060 (4L/256d toy, 50 steps, 7.6MB artifact). NOT validated at 8xH100 scale — submitted as research/methodology contribution.
